Added technical handover documentation for SPESTG-480 DIA exception notification flow.

The Confluence page documents the implemented DIA exception notification behavior, including the high-level process flow, covered exception scenarios, D365 email notification behavior, TPC Log traceability, Dataverse logical names, DEV validation summary, and unit test result summary.

This documentation is intended to support QA/demo alignment, sprint close, and future technical handover after the team transition.
